title: Neeye Neeye Song Lyrics M Kumaran
stanzas: <div>Neeye Neeye Song Lyrics M. Kumaran S/O Mahalakshmi

Neeye neeye naane neeye
en nenjil vazhum
uyir theeye neeye (2)

Thandhai neeye
thozhan neeye
thaalaatidum
en thozhi neeye

April May Veiyyilum neeye
June July Thendralum neeye
I Like You

September vaan mazhai neeye
Octopber Vaadaiyum neeye
I Thank You.

Unai pol oru
thaai thaan irukka
enna vendum vazhvil jayikka

Neeye neeye naane neeye
en nenjil vazhum
uyir theeye neeye

Thandhai neeye
thozhan neeye
thaalaatidum
en thozhi neeye

you are the love
of my life and my
dreams forever.

you are the love
of my heart and
my life forever.

en kannil neerum vanthaal
enn nenjil baaram vanthaal
saaivene un tholile

kanneerey koodaathendrum
en pillai vaadaathendrum
solvaaye annaalile

ini oru jenmam eduthu
vanthaalum un maganaagum
varam tharuvaai

un veettu chinna kuyil
nee konjum vanna kuyil
naan thaane.

naan vayathil valarnthaal
kooda madi oonjal
vendum aada.

Vaerukku neerai vittai
neeraai kanneerai vittaai
poovaachu en thottamae

un peyarai sollum pillai
poraadi vellum pillai
poo maalai en tholile

ilam pirai endru
irundhavan ennai
mulu nilavaai nee
vadivamaithaai

vattraadha gangai nadhiyaa
theiyaatha mangai madhiyaai
nee vazhga

pudhu vidiyal vendum
enakku entha naalum
neethaan kizhakku

Neeye neeye naane neeye
en nenjil vazhum
uyir theeye neeye

Thandhai neeye
thozhan neeye
thaalaatidum
en thozhi neeye

April May Veiyyilum neeye
June July Thendralum neeye
I Like You

September vaan mazhai neeye
Octopber Vaadaiyum neeye
I Thank You.

Unai pol oru
thaai thaan irukka
enna vendum vazhvil jayikka

I love you
my dear mom
you are my only friend

hats off to you mom
I love you forever

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Neeye Neeye'?

The song 'Neeye Neeye' expresses deep feelings of love and affection, highlighting the significance of the beloved in one's life.

What is the plot context of the song in the movie?

In M Kumaran S/O Mahalakshmi, the song plays during a romantic moment, showcasing the protagonist's feelings for his love interest.

Who is the singer and music director of this song?

The song is sung by KK and composed by Srikanth Deva.

When was 'Neeye Neeye' released?

'Neeye Neeye' was released on October 1, 2004.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In 'Neeye Neeye', the protagonist expresses his heartfelt emotions towards his beloved, making it a quintessential romantic ballad. The song's soothing melody and KK's captivating voice evoke feelings of joy and affection, making it perfect for love-struck listeners. Set against the backdrop of M Kumaran S/O Mahalakshmi, it beautifully encapsulates the essence of young love and connection. This track is sure to resonate with anyone celebrating love and companionship.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Neeye Neeye from M Kumaran S/O Mahalakshmi is a heartwarming romantic track that beautifully captures the essence of love. With KK's soulful vocals and Srikanth Deva's enchanting composition, this song resonates with anyone who has experienced the joy of affection. Dive into this melodic journey that celebrates the beauty of companionship and connection.
stanzaMeanings: You are the one, you are the one, you live in my heart, my life is you.
You are my father, you are my friend, you are my companion, my friend.
In April and May, you are there, in June and July, you are the breeze, I like you.
In September, you are the rain, in October, you are the cloud, I thank you.
There should be a mother like you to help me succeed in life.
You are the one, you are the one, you live in my heart, my life is you.
You are my father, you are my friend, you are my companion, my friend.
you are the love of my life and my dreams forever.
you are the love of my heart and my life forever.
If water comes to my eyes, if sorrow comes to my heart, I will die in your embrace.
Don't let my tears fall, don't let my child cry, but if it happens, it's okay.
Even if I take another birth, you will give me blessings as your child.
You are the little cuckoo of your house, I am the colorful cuckoo.
Even if I grow up, I still want to swing in the lap of my mother.
You have poured out water, you have shed tears, you have made flowers bloom in my garden.
When I call your name, the child will come, the flower will bloom in my embrace.
You are the one who made me whole, like the young moon.
You are the river that flows without a dam, you are the beautiful moon, may you live long.
I need a new dawn, every day you are my east.
You are the one, you are the one, you live in my heart, my life is you.
You are my father, you are my friend, you are my companion, my friend.
In April and May, you are there, in June and July, you are the breeze, I like you.
In September, you are the rain, in October, you are the cloud, I thank you.
There should be a mother like you to help me succeed in life.
I love you my dear mom you are my only friend.
hats off to you mom I love you forever.
